narrative:
Green Springs (precinct in Sandusky County) has 398 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.1 percentage points.
